title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at MyGlamm Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at MyGlamm Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with MyGlamm Global Group! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Raipur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About MyGlamm Global Group:
MyGlamm Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MyGlamm Global Group!
